prompt.description: Text prompt describing video content. Supports Chinese and English, up to 5000 characters.
prompt.title: Prompt

negative_prompt.description: Content to exclude from the video. Up to 500 characters.
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

first_frame.description: First frame image. Formats: JPEG, JPG, PNG, BMP, WEBP. Resolution: 240-8000px. Up to 20MB.
first_frame.title: First Frame

last_frame.description: Last frame image for first+last frame generation. Same format limits as first_frame.
last_frame.title: Last Frame

driving_audio.description: Audio file for driving video generation (lip-sync, action timing). WAV/MP3, 2-30s, up to 15MB.
driving_audio.title: Driving Audio

first_clip.description: Video clip for continuation. MP4/MOV, 2-10s, 240-4096px, up to 100MB.
first_clip.title: First Clip

duration.description: Video duration in seconds (2-15). For continuation, total output length including input clip.
duration.title: Duration

prompt_extend.description: Enable prompt rewriting via LLM for better results.
prompt_extend.title: Prompt Extend

watermark.description: Add 'AI Generated' watermark to bottom-right corner.
watermark.title: Watermark
